purpose: Exterior elevation and facade design knowledge for BuildSetu agent.
globalRules: Exterior/elevation output must stay scoped to facade/exterior unless user asks full project.
Always detect front width, floor count, style, balcony, window positions, parking/gate, climate, material preference and road side.
Do not convert exterior request into interior design or full floor plan.
Mention structural feasibility for cantilevers, balconies, heavy facade panels and large openings.
Final facade execution, structural support, waterproofing, fire, local bylaws and approval require professional verification.

cautions: Heavy stone/cladding needs fixing details and structural support.
Large glazing needs heat gain, privacy and safety check.
Balcony/cantilever projection needs structural engineer review.
Local facade, setback, height and compound wall rules must be checked.

renderPromptRules: Exterior render prompt must include front width, floor count, facade style, material palette, balcony/window/gate, lighting and camera view.
Use front elevation or 3/4 street view only when user asks render.
Avoid interior furniture focus unless requested.
Avoid impossible cantilevers, random windows and unsupported large projections.
